modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't log into KnowBe4 training due to screen issues.

full_description_text:  
User is trying to access KnowBe4 training.  
Keeps getting stuck bouncing between two screens.  
This is causing frustration and delays.  
Need help to resolve the login issue.
short_description: Can't log into KnowBe4 training due to screen issues.
description:
